title: Ebaq 9

{{Quote|Ebaq Nine was once exploited by the Deep Core Mining Corporation for its deposits of bronzium. The moon was opened up shortly after the rise of Palpatine. During the war years the Empire maintained an observation post there, and used Ebaq Nine as an emergency resupply point, but the moon is now empty.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
'''Ebaq 9''' was a natural satellite of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ebaq/Legends|Ebaq]] located in the [[Treskov system]].<ref name="DW" /> The [[Moon/Legends|moon]] was a barren planetoid.

During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Deep Core Mining Corporation]] was permitted to build a series of [[Mining/Legends|mines]] and refineries to process the moon's valuable [[Bronzium/Legends|bronzium]] deposits, as well as a small base to handle emergency resupply and transportation. When the Empire began to crumble after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], abandoning the Deep Core, Deep Core Mining also deserted the facility.

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] the Treskov system was chosen by the newly reinstated [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] as the location for a trap to lure a large [[Yuuzhan Vong]] force into battle along one of the dead-end [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] that led to Ebaq and destroy it in detail. The old Deep Core Mining facility on Ebaq 9 made it the ideal location for a base of operations to serve as lure, resulting in the [[Battle of Ebaq]] in which the former [[Fosh/Legends|Fosh]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Vergere]] perished, sacrificing herself in order to eliminate the Yuuzhan Vong warriors throughout the moon in order to save [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo's]] life. With the exception of [[Tsavong Lah]], the entire force was killed almost instantly. The warmaster, who had had an [[ooglith cloaker]] placed on him by one of his [[subaltern]]s, would be slain in a duel with [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wizards of the Coast]] refers to Ebaq 9 as a green world with jungles.

''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' incorrectly states that [[Tarkin's Fang]] was a base on the surface of Ebaq 9, as opposed to a planet itself.
